assertions.reason: Chinese text is present in DOM but visually renders as tofu/square fallback glyphs in screenshot, violating the no-tofu requirement.
English paragraph renders with consistent typography; computed styles confirm intended sans font stack, normal weight, letter spacing, and line height.
Mixed Chinese/English paragraph appears with tofu/square fallback glyphs for Chinese characters in screenshot, so bilingual typography is not graceful.
Code block is visibly distinct from body text and computed style confirms monospace font family (JetBrains Mono/SF Mono/Fira Code/.../monospace).

frictions.description: No inline code sample was present on tested foundation pages; validation used the available code block sample and computed font checks.
frictions.resolution: Validated monospace behavior on the available code block and captured full-page evidence.
